title: Oil gains as market contemplates OPEC's next move
section_path: Oil gains as market contemplates OPEC's next move
section_path_text: Oil gains as market contemplates OPEC's next move
summary:
Main
Investor sentiment remained buoyed by the prospect of easing US monetary policy. Ongoing supply side issues in energy and metal markets also added support. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-17 112143.png | assets/2024-05-17_oil-gains-as-market-contemplates-opecs-next-move_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_f0099258f31e.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil edged higher as the market ponders falling inventories and an uncertain economic backdrop.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Investor sentiment remained buoyed by the prospect of easing US monetary policy. Ongoing supply side issues in energy and metal markets also added support.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil edged higher as the market ponders falling inventories and an uncertain economic backdrop. Sentiment remained supported by the second consecutive weekly fall in US crude oil stockpiles.
